lore.setting: A chaotic guild in a fantasy MMO world where the line between game and reality blurs.

cards.name: RegginA, The Eternal Flame
cards.description: The founder of NumbahWan. When everything goes wrong, she makes it right.

cards.name: RegginA - Practicing Trainee
cards.description: Before the legend. Day one energy, oversized gear, unlimited potential.

cards.name: RegginA - Chain of the Undead
cards.description: The edgy phase. We don't talk about the necromancer arc.

cards.name: RegginA - Infernal Warlord
cards.description: When the rage meter hits max. Guild chat: 'oh no she's transforming again'

cards.name: RegginA - Sky Sovereign
cards.description: Achieved final form. Ascended beyond the meta.

cards.name: RegginA - Holy Paladin
cards.description: The tryhard build. 'Fine, I'll do it myself.'

cards.name: Harlay, The Dog of War
cards.description: Guild mascot turned war machine. Good boy with great damage.

cards.name: The Sacred Log
cards.description: The heart of NumbahWan. All card power flows from this mystical artifact.

cards.name: Reggino, Shadow Commander
cards.description: RegginA's right hand. Cool, calculating, knows everyone's secrets.

cards.name: Burnout, The Eternal Grinder
cards.description: Sleep is for the weak. Energy drinks are a food group.

cards.name: Whaleford, The Unlimited Budget
cards.description: Credit card go brrrr. Every banner is a must-pull.

cards.name: Veteran, The Day-One Player
cards.description: 'Back in my day, we had to walk uphill both ways to the dungeon.'

cards.name: Webweaver, The Drama Spinner
cards.description: Knows all the tea. Spills it strategically.

cards.name: AFK Luna, The Moonlit Slacker
cards.description: Joined the raid 3 hours ago. Still 'getting ready'.

cards.name: Chadwick, The Absolute Carry
cards.description: Dragging four corpses to victory since 2019.

cards.name: Mochi, The Devoted Simp
cards.description: Has every RegginA variant. Shrine in their room. 'Respectfully.'

cards.name: 404, The Ghost Member
cards.description: No one remembers inviting them. Always there for loot distribution.

cards.name: Karen, The Guild Mom
cards.description: 'Did you eat today? Take a break. I made potions.'

cards.name: CAPS_LOCK, The Rage Quitter
cards.description: LEAVES DRAMATICALLY. Returns in 10 minutes.

cards.name: BigBrain, The Theory Crafter
cards.description: Has spreadsheets for spreadsheets. 'Actually, the optimal rotation is...'

cards.name: Grimhelm, The Burnt Out Tank
cards.description: 10,000 hours tanking. Dead inside but shield still up.

cards.name: Zephyra, The Comeback Queen
cards.description: Down 0-2? Perfect. That's when she activates.

cards.name: Fenneko, The Sass Master
cards.description: 'Skill issue.' Types it before you even die.

cards.name: Chonk, The Immovable
cards.description: Massive cat knight. Hasn't moved in hours. Very comfy.

cards.name: Glimmer, The Fashion Disaster
cards.description: Zero defense. Maximum drip. Worth it.

cards.name: Snipe, The Kill Stealer
cards.description: Always gets the last hit. 'Oh was that yours?'

cards.name: Mumbles, The Mic-Muted
cards.description: In voice chat for 3 years. Never spoken. Types '...'

cards.name: Hype, The Cheerleader
cards.description: 'YOU GOT THIS!' Buffs team morale. Actual buff unclear.

cards.name: Server Crash
cards.description: Everyone disconnects. Pure chaos. Free compensation incoming.

cards.name: Ninja Loot
cards.description: Shadowy hand grabbing the drop. Trust destroyed.

cards.name: Rage Quit Spectacular
cards.description: Dramatic exit. Explosions. They'll be back tomorrow.

cards.name: Accidental Pull
cards.description: Last currency. Meant to save. Legendary appears. Worth?

cards.name: The Carry Diff
cards.description: Split screen: one destroying, four watching. Tale as old as time.

cards.name: Maintenance Day
cards.description: Locked gates. Tumbleweeds. Touch grass? Never.

cards.name: Onca, The Primal Instinct
cards.description: Feral focus. When they zone in, everything dies.

cards.name: Panthera, Shadow Stalker
cards.description: You don't see Panthera. Panthera sees you.

cards.name: The Promised Update
cards.description: Players looking at sky. 'Soon™' in the clouds.

cards.name: Guild Drama Bomb
cards.description: Chat explodes. Popcorn emojis. Best content.

cards.name: Newbie with Potential
cards.description: Sparkly eyes. Oversized gear. Will be legend or leech.

cards.name: The Alt Account
cards.description: 'Totally not [main].' Suspiciously skilled.

cards.name: Dedicated Healer
cards.description: 'Rez on cooldown.' 'Stand in the circle.' 'WHY DID YOU PULL.'

cards.name: One-Trick Pony
cards.description: 10,000 hours one character. Literally fused with main.

cards.name: The Backseat Gamer
cards.description: Ghost over your shoulder. 'You should have dodged.'

cards.name: Early Bird
cards.description: Catches every daily reset. Server's first login.

cards.name: Night Owl
cards.description: 3 AM energy. Questionable sanity. Unquestionable dedication.

cards.name: Weekend Warrior
cards.description: Friday arrives. 'MY TIME HAS COME.' Gone by Monday.

cards.name: Gacha Victim
cards.description: Empty wallet. One 3-star. Regret infinite.

cards.name: F2P Legend
cards.description: Amazing gear. '$0 spent btw.' Maximum smug.

cards.name: Guild Bank Robbery
cards.description: Officer with gold bags. Trust issues created.

cards.name: Accidental Guild Kick
cards.description: Misclick. Shocked faces. 'I'M SO SORRY'

cards.name: The Perfect Run
cards.description: Flawless clear. Zero deaths. Will never happen again.

cards.name: Disconnected at Boss
cards.description: 'Player has disconnected.' Boss at 1%. Pain.

cards.name: Carried to Victory
cards.description: One standing, four being dragged. Classic.

cards.name: Login Streak Broken
cards.description: Crumbling streak counter. 847 days. Gone.

cards.name: Golden Keyboard
cards.description: Bejeweled. RGB. +100% flex, +0% skill.

cards.name: Energy Drink Elixir
cards.description: Dubious contents. Heart palpitations. +stamina.

cards.name: Copium Inhaler
cards.description: 'Next patch for sure.' Pure denial in portable form.

cards.name: Touch Grass Scroll
cards.description: Ancient artifact. Rarely used. Full HP restore.

cards.name: Ragequit Button
cards.description: Big. Red. Tempting. Dramatic effect guaranteed.

cards.name: Second Monitor
cards.description: Portal to distraction. Netflix visible. DPS halved.

cards.name: Hopeful Applicant
cards.description: Nervous at guild door. Resume ready. 'I can learn!'

cards.name: Eternal Lurker
cards.description: 0 messages. 5 years. Merged with shadows.

cards.name: Ping Spammer
cards.description: @everyone @everyone @everyone 'guys?'

cards.name: "On My Way"
cards.description: Said 'omw' 20 minutes ago. Clearly not moving.

cards.name: Bio Break Legend
cards.description: 'brb' from 2 hours ago. Chair still warm somehow.

cards.name: Inventory Hoarder
cards.description: 'Might need it later.' Narrator: They never did.

cards.name: Guide Reader
cards.description: Wiki tabs everywhere. Still dies to tutorial boss.

cards.name: Meta Slave
cards.description: Exact same build as rank 1. Zero originality. Effective.

cards.name: Off-Meta Enjoyer
cards.description: Terrible build. Winning anyway. Maximum disrespect.

cards.name: The Minimizer
cards.description: Game in tiny window. Main screen: YouTube essay.

cards.name: "First!"
cards.description: Only contribution: being first to comment. Every time.

cards.name: Emoji Reactor
cards.description: Never types words. Communicates purely in reactions.

cards.name: Loading Screen
cards.description: Endless spinning. Existential dread builds.

cards.name: Git Gud Moment
cards.description: Harsh wisdom received. Growth or tilt incoming.

cards.name: Patch Notes Panic
cards.description: Reading the nerfs. Chaos in chat. 'MY MAIN!'

cards.name: Free Real Estate
cards.description: Uncontested resource. Suspicious but taking it.

cards.name: Basic Gaming Chair
cards.description: Standard issue. +5 gaming. Squeaks ominously.

cards.name: Gamer Snacks
cards.description: Chips, candy, energy drinks. +stamina, -health.

cards.name: Broken Headset
cards.description: Held together with tape. 4 years strong.

cards.name: Sticky Keyboard
cards.description: Questionable residue. Veteran equipment. Character.

cards.name: GG EZ
cards.description: Victory smugness. Tilts enemies. Toxic but effective.

cards.name: Copium Cloud
cards.description: Floating cloud of denial. 'It's not that bad.'

cards.name: Tilt
cards.description: Red aura. Poor decisions incoming. Just one more game.

cards.name: In The Zone
cards.description: Blue focus aura. Can't miss. Transcendent gaming.

cards.name: Lag Spike
cards.description: Rubber-banding. Teleporting. 'IT'S NOT MY FAULT!'

cards.name: Cracked Phone Screen
cards.description: Mobile player's weapon. Battle scars included.

cards.name: Charging Cable
cards.description: Lifeline at 2% battery. Panic mode essential.

cards.name: WiFi Signal (1 Bar)
cards.description: Pathetic signal. Prayers required.

cards.name: Notification
cards.description: Ping! Could be anything. Usually nothing.

cards.name: Daily Login
cards.description: The bare minimum. Checking in. Streak maintained.

cards.name: Free Summon
cards.description: Low expectations. Usually correct.

cards.name: Auto-Battle
cards.description: Phone plays itself. Owner doing something else.

cards.name: Skip Button
cards.description: Most pressed button. Story? What story?

cards.name: Loading Tip
cards.description: 'Did you know?' Useless advice. Every time.

cards.name: Connection Lost
cards.description: Spinning wheel of doom. Existential dread.

cards.name: Guild Chat
cards.description: Chaotic scrolling text. Memes. Drama. Home.

cards.name: AFK Spot
cards.description: Cozy corner. Safe zone. Characters vibing.

cards.name: Spawn Point
cards.description: Where legends begin. And respawn. Repeatedly.

cards.name: Loot Pile
cards.description: Sparkling drops. Desire sensor active.

cards.name: Salt Shaker
cards.description: Infinite supply. Post-loss essential.

cards.name: Tiny Crown
cards.description: Participation trophy energy. 'You tried.'

cards.name: Expired Coupon
cards.description: 'Ended 2 minutes ago.' Maximum pain.

cards.name: 1 Star Review
cards.description: Rage review. Questionable grammar. Still playing.

cards.name: Unread Messages (99+)
cards.description: Social debt accumulating. Anxiety rising.

cards.name: Maintenance Compensation
cards.description: Free stuff! Temporary happiness. Gone in seconds.

cards.name: Limited Banner
cards.description: FOMO zone. Wallet danger. 'LIMITED TIME!'

cards.name: Newbie Zone
cards.description: Tutorial area. Simpler times. Nostalgia.

cards.name: The Void (Empty Inventory)
cards.description: Nothing left. Spent everything. Echo echo echo.

cards.name: Harlay, Dog of War
cards.description: The guild's most loyal warrior. Barks at enemies, bites harder.

cards.name: RegginA, Paladin of Light
cards.description: The holy protector form. When the guild needs a shield, she becomes one.

cards.name: Asmongold, The Bald Sovereign
cards.description: The Bald One himself. Summoned from the React Throne after 1 million prayers. His mere presence makes copium levels drop to zero.
cards.flavorText: "It is what it is... and what it is, is legendary."

cards.name: The React Throne
cards.description: A legendary gaming chair forged from a million hours of content. Whoever sits upon it gains the power to react to anything.
cards.flavorText: "You see this clip? Chat, look at this. Look at this clip."

cards.name: McConnell, The Eternal Backseat
cards.description: The voice in the background. Always has an opinion. Never takes the wheel. Somehow makes everything funnier.
cards.flavorText: "Dude, just do the thing. No, not that thing. The OTHER thing."

cards.name: The One True Transmog
cards.description: The ultimate cosmetic achievement. Looks terrible. Absolutely perfect. True transmog is about the journey, not the destination.
cards.flavorText: "This is the best transmog in the game. No, I'm not being ironic."

cards.name: Zack's Dr Pepper
cards.description: The sacred beverage. 23 flavors of pure gaming fuel. Grants +50% react speed and -100% hydration awareness.
cards.flavorText: "You know what? This is actually pretty good."

cards.name: The Cockroach (Survivor)
cards.description: It has witnessed everything. Every react, every take, every ban. It remains. It endures. It is the true content king.
cards.flavorText: "Even after the apocalypse, this thing will still be watching streams."

cards.name: Chat (Collective Consciousness)
cards.description: 10,000 voices speaking as one. Usually wrong. Always loud. The true power behind the throne.
cards.flavorText: "KEKW KEKW KEKW KEKW KEKW KEKW KEKW"

model.note: Cards are collectible art + NWG investment. No battle mechanics.
